steps.name: layout-spacing
steps.summary: Certs section-pad 통일, FAB bottom-6 right-6, Hero eyebrow tracking 0.15em, Contact p-7

steps.name: mobile-responsive
steps.summary: Hero py-16 md:py-24, TechStack 필터탭 overflow-x-auto+scrollbar-hide, ProjectModal px-5 md:px-8, Hero h1 clamp 44→32px, eyebrow 장식라인 sm 숨김, meta pill rounded-2xl sm:rounded-full, Experience h3 text-xl md:text-2xl, CoreStrengths h3 text-[18px] md:text-[22px]

steps.name: content-policy
steps.summary: Nav 연락 제거(4개), 섹션 h2 포트폴리오→프로젝트, live URL 필터 동작 확인(수정 불필요)

steps.name: inline-style-cleanup
steps.summary: --color-surface-glass·.border-l-accent 추가, Nav color-mix 교체, ProjectModal·Contact·Blog bg-surface/bg-card 클래스화

steps.name: component-review
steps.summary: ARCHITECTURE.md 컴포넌트 분류 수정(Hero·CoreStrengths·Experience·Contact Client), ADR-009 추가
